use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and action bars
Multi-variant button system for consistent UI theming
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built with Radix UI's Slot for composition and Tailwind CSS for styling. Supports accessibility features including focus-visible rings, disabled states, and keyboard navigation.
